calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Gail L. Jackson-McCray, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, Parts Student Loan Trust 2007-CTI on behalf of Access Group, Inc., Servicing Administrator.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Joseph Amiga.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,225.17
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,509.10
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $485.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,044.27
Judgment signed in open court.
